
==========================
Division polynomial checks
==========================
Curve E_a' over Q(a): y^2 = x^3 - 16/3*x + (16*a^2 + 128/27)

Explicit division polynomials (odd indices):
psi_3(x) = 3*x^4 - 32*x^2 + (192*a^2 + 512/9)*x - 256/9
psi_5(x) = 5*x^12 - 992/3*x^10 + (6080*a^2 + 48640/27)*x^9 - 8960/3*x^8 + (-20480*a^2 - 163840/27)*x^7 + (-61440*a^4 - 327680/9*a^2 + 9748480/243)*x^6 + (-950272/3*a^2 - 7602176/81)*x^5 + (2621440*a^4 + 41943040/27*a^2 + 94044160/729)*x^4 + (-6553600*a^6 - 52428800/9*a^4 - 372244480/243*a^2 - 2222981120/19683)*x^3 + (-5242880/3*a^4 - 83886080/81*a^2 + 136314880/2187)*x^2 + (41943040/3*a^6 + 335544320/27*a^4 + 1740636160/729*a^2 - 1174405120/59049)*x - 16777216*a^8 - 536870912/27*a^6 - 1845493760/243*a^4 - 19864223744/19683*a^2 + 1493172224/531441
psi_7(x) = 7*x^24 - 4928/3*x^22 + (63104*a^2 + 504832/27)*x^21 - 756224/9*x^20 + (28672/3*a^2 + 229376/81)*x^19 + (-10981376*a^4 - 175702016/27*a^2 + 1492664320/729)*x^18 + (-126386176/3*a^2 - 1011089408/81)*x^17 + (780795904*a^4 + 12492734464/27*a^2 + 29190848512/729)*x^16 + (-3398434816*a^6 - 27187478528/9*a^4 - 198738706432/243*a^2 - 1289731702784/19683)*x^15 + (-13442744320/3*a^4 - 215083909120/81*a^2 - 83995131904/2187)*x^14 + (139754209280/3*a^6 + 1118033674240/27*a^4 + 7416955535360/729*a^2 + 34898622545920/59049)*x^13 + (-60834185216*a^8 - 1946693926912/27*a^6 - 4979477708800/243*a^4 + 10161892622336/19683*a^2 - 1078974369234944/531441)*x^12 + (-2730257022976/9*a^6 - 21842056183808/81*a^4 - 82907364327424/2187*a^2 + 806006447669248/177147)*x^11 + (3453690576896/3*a^8 + 110518098460672/81*a^6 + 261965624639488/729*a^4 - 1571966620270592/59049*a^2 - 12182350465073152/1594323)*x^10 + (-1631013830656*a^10 - 65240553226240/27*a^8 + 644588691783680/729*a^6 + 32171710228725760/19683*a^4 + 207469499039875072/531441*a^2 + 144576192685539328/14348907)*x^9 + (-39535173959680/3*a^8 - 1265125566709760/81*a^6 - 4390538908270592/729*a^4 - 48809795058139136/59049*a^2 - 16945557243166720/1594323)*x^8 + (39857296506880*a^10 + 1594291860275200/27*a^8 + 22332799147048960/729*a^6 + 127848463298723840/19683*a^4 + 262685147625684992/531441*a^2 + 129397125426446336/14348907)*x^7 + (-47141561040896*a^12 - 13238119998423040/81*a^8 - 205298612115079168/2187*a^6 - 1538207971165601792/59049*a^4 - 4571103594001989632/1594323*a^2 + 142263610494681088/43046721)*x^5 + (815837627809792/3*a^12 + 13053402044956672/27*a^10 + 276307272060108800/729*a^8 + 9817143500225904640/59049*a^6 + 20315896248742707200/531441*a^4 + 48767510039958126592/14348907*a^2 - 1605953280599392256/1162261467)*x^4 + (-215504279044096*a^14 - 12068239626469376/27*a^12 - 128686840914903040/243*a^10 - 7718747548847964160/19683*a^8 - 84974568680110161920/531441*a^6 - 152947450632571191296/4782969*a^4 - 941454333192781692928/387420489*a^2 + 4526821312949125120/10460353203)*x^3 + (2339760743907328/9*a^12 + 37436171902517248/81*a^10 + 688874821127241728/2187*a^8 + 18213682792993128448/177147*a^6 + 25923933315981639680/1594323*a^4 + 46568627521894481920/43046721*a^2 - 333477478657949696/3486784401)*x^2 + (-985162418487296/3*a^14 - 55169095435288576/81*a^12 - 401453685533573120/729*a^10 - 12866221185444085760/59049*a^8 - 70372121877384527872/1594323*a^6 - 67653073602359590912/14348907*a^4 - 323774613998268317696/1162261467*a^2 + 417708865438613504/31381059609)*x + 281474976710656*a^16 + 18014398509481984/27*a^14 + 458804212038369280/729*a^12 + 5881701113345867776/19683*a^10 + 39597055298724954112/531441*a^8 + 134936852035274801152/14348907*a^6 + 233368088441037783040/387420489*a^4 + 333923897971012796416/10460353203*a^2 - 247979454482087936/282429536481
psi_9(x) = 9*x^40 - 5568*x^38 + (365184*a^2 + 324608/3)*x^37 - 2739712/3*x^36 + (7114752*a^2 + 6324224/3)*x^35 + (-332550144*a^4 - 197066752*a^2 + 984596480/27)*x^34 + (-1661698048*a^2 - 13293584384/27)*x^33 + (51816038400*a^4 + 92117401600/3*a^2 + 267740053504/81)*x^32 + (-371976044544*a^6 - 330645372928*a^4 - 3028312653824/27*a^2 - 30356895956992/2187)*x^31 + (-311745839104*a^4 - 4987933425664/27*a^2 + 22661002428416/729)*x^30 + (8516618158080*a^6 + 22710981754880/3*a^4 + 131528843591680/81*a^2 + 249686581575680/6561)*x^29 + (-4490740629504*a^8 - 15967077793792/3*a^6 + 77636902584320/27*a^4 + 5770357281652736/2187*a^2 - 41675236843716608/59049)*x^28 + (-666453296545792/3*a^6 - 5331626372366336/27*a^4 - 19513772666257408/729*a^2 + 214117631672713216/59049)*x^27 + (1138028357615616*a^8 + 1348774349766656*a^6 + 2539413372403712/9*a^4 - 50751274894753792/729*a^2 - 237025986502197248/19683)*x^26 + (-3334635157192704*a^10 - 4940200232878080*a^8 + 24151468688801792/9*a^6 + 1001199001736839168/243*a^4 + 6396828435582287872/6561*a^2 + 4859459383198744576/177147)*x^25 + (-48003668351385600*a^8 - 512039129081446400/9*a^6 - 1766272486929858560/81*a^4 - 19240070850208071680/6561*a^2 - 5983084649591603200/177147)*x^24 + (239563311446753280*a^10 + 354908609550745600*a^8 + 4496755167487590400/27*a^6 + 17065519974711296000/729*a^4 - 8672708576118046720/19683*a^2 - 22200833012704215040/531441)*x^23 + (-428315785392291840*a^12 - 761450285141852160*a^10 - 1125453230243840000/9*a^8 + 216841944890448281600/729*a^6 + 1057207101509934776320/6561*a^4 + 4891034759552250675200/177147*a^2 + 5624370007355068252160/14348907)*x^22 + (-3279510583388405760*a^10 - 34773433771646552021665841152/2541865828329)*x^11 + (67404402845334701604864*a^20 + 599150247514086236487680/3*a^18 + 228661227851685174444032/9*a^16 - 262861970979688599588438016/729*a^14 - 9106538796971470220970426368/19683*a^12 - 48872420462437722514366922752/177147*a^10 - 1358256770263194340397038960640/14348907*a^8 - 7706976354312476702168697536512/387420489*a^6 - 8731343847497746801411269591040/3486784401*a^4 - 125143766928187030294908840706048/847288609443*a^2 + 188353787515335655497291268096/22876792454961)*x^10 + (1795329366973782111027200/3*a^18 + 14362634935790256888217600/9*a^16 + 448235386658476212956954624/243*a^14 + 23827861348751723089396498432/19683*a^12 + 88989078719347379893939732480/177147*a^10 + 672581895061411579347536445440/4782969*a^8 + 10481643129848955684230612910080/387420489*a^6 + 11292614363769588219247373320192/3486784401*a^4 + 16129284016052645477305781583872/94143178827*a^2 - 98620173537264845532031877120/22876792454961)*x^9 + (-837076352576792033230848*a^20 - 7440678689571484739829760/3*a^18 - 28867863203270288610426880/9*a^16 - 1733002245967295226409123840/729*a^14 - 22813517467223756967677788160/19683*a^12 - 74988024026567788353078427648/177147*a^10 - 1776251770613148974076882059264/14348907*a^8 - 10135844588253603415574443982848/387420489*a^6 - 11120468648720769361090340454400/3486784401*a^4 - 130570862421005431579623112572928/847288609443*a^2 + 44574360065346696746176086016/22876792454961)*x^8 + (464193867870827156865024*a^22 + 1512928161949362585337856*a^20 + 49612887121123313262264320/27*a^18 + 222435267259367463678115840/243*a^16 + 823153045297861243023917056/6561*a^14 + 11713511301020561251521003520/177147*a^12 + 652272725684337311490026504192/4782969*a^10 + 10303932094131052230162545377280/129140163*a^8 + 71875170982837955237732509810688/3486784401*a^6 + 696353892905793862729769691381760/282429536481*a^4 + 838299706560080360582356790149120/7625597484987*a^2 - 154899419704165326933551218688/205891132094649)*x^7 + (1163177894311829486698496*a^20 + 93054231544946358935879680/27*a^18 + 319595006165358620421652480/81*a^16 + 13718474632736319345786880000/6561*a^14 + 65589483774024402898402672640/177147*a^12 - 201898361279041461263727067136/1594323*a^10 - 10067938179551969549563488894976/129140163*a^8 - 55641801751367141269246230659072/3486784401*a^6 - 47333449278405799484477621141504/31381059609*a^4 - 476423010722445329902062364786688/7625597484987*a^2 + 50386130950803251121788813312/205891132094649)*x^6 + (-1423793494585198031929344*a^22 - 13921536391499714089975808/3*a^20 - 434404589801075076151377920/81*a^18 - 1515926864665984810048552960/729*a^16 + 17336175703200131411804684288/19683*a^14 + 653008912809078266064206299136/531441*a^12 + 7637414004933391367762561990656/14348907*a^10 + 45033734146527721945891801661440/387420489*a^8 + 136535323003532495490283158372352/10460353203*a^6 + 615273226564982495143561565044736/847288609443*a^4 + 642396568112052830115920196141056/22876792454961*a^2 - 40642027103657301688308465664/617673396283947)*x^5 + (552516878495748490002432*a^24 + 1964504456873772408897536*a^22 - 4769590147698341665832960/27*a^20 - 14974813011838959758438563840/2187*a^18 - 68926929217160496744098693120/6561*a^16 - 1383554247563597648020602093568/177147*a^14 - 48342356632919170636330496425984/14348907*a^12 - 112644152118624204971061375139840/129140163*a^10 - 452528876122833688739331272867840/3486784401*a^8 - 8147385017371841649935454117560320/847288609443*a^6 - 2061243770103106757145200584294400/7625597484987*a^4 - 2016945905986216581283986590924800/205891132094649*a^2 + 237444317428207228364353699840/16677181699666569)*x^4 + (5817955506895402903273472*a^22 + 511980084606795455488065536/27*a^20 + 19616257022658150731752669184/729*a^18 + 143122914395446526049702117376/6561*a^16 + 1966898791127916976413784145920/177147*a^14 + 17452786496582110490481462870016/4782969*a^12 + 98045958563010748498248992817152/129140163*a^10 + 322028614377036757903370526654464/3486784401*a^8 + 502982429636342584437945619447808/94143178827*a^6 + 573963512677908719072721491722240/7625597484987*a^4 + 528025380955722099657924772102144/205891132094649*a^2 - 13249222520066528440192335872/5559060566555523)*x^3 + (-5893513370621317226692608*a^24 - 62864142619960717084721152/3*a^22 - 2692580031736682829364330496/81*a^20 - 203655643572280430771002408960/6561*a^18 - 371398030052723976306302124032/19683*a^16 - 4118413739758207999854638006272/531441*a^14 - 92375587813479534813651769753600/43046721*a^12 - 149226849767452506786656558252032/387420489*a^10 - 425954158654090362115161954713600/10460353203*a^8 - 5080765458257858795235748435984384/2541865828329*a^6 - 338292480585140813280471821582336/22876792454961*a^4 - 293383535974064616077716722024448/617673396283947*a^2 + 14494718345724500147433373696/50031545098999707)*x^2 + (2720083094132915643088896*a^26 + 31432071309980358542360576/3*a^24 + 502913140959685736677769216/27*a^22 + 44256356404452344827643691008/2187*a^20 + 877195365786555314537626599424/59049*a^18 + 1352749306522542378362620346368/177147*a^16 + 39476766022374150949277561520128/14348907*a^14 + 262829955998349439732369057644544/387420489*a^12 + 379459686296598416864197530877952/3486784401*a^10 + 8704419606471887501066997692628992/847288609443*a^8 + 10194356344950501346786198448766976/22876792454961*a^6 + 376971678576436737258175923748864/205891132094649*a^4 + 926746319807944963730577949720576/16677181699666569*a^2 - 10246855247053596884809547776/450283905890997363)*x - 1208925819614629174706176/3*a^24 - 38685626227668133590597632/27*a^22 - 1615124895005144577407451136/729*a^20 - 115283166158451038099980943360/59049*a^18 - 191136007784351331037745250304/177147*a^16 - 1853815208829856961661438525440/4782969*a^14 - 35103218764255742186449170071552/387420489*a^12 - 46589215722859416287557500010496/3486784401*a^10 - 107615366764043212291884942622720/94143178827*a^8 - 1024370971878502518886729628254208/22876792454961*a^6 - 22149772035216128920140447219712/205891132094649*a^4 - 17186437622277617360825313394688/5559060566555523*a^2 + 390483039735525223430094848/450283905890997363

Compute psi_3 at 4/3
psi_3(4/3) = 256*a^2
factor(psi_3(4/3)) = (256) * a^2

Compute psi_5 at 4/3
psi_5(4/3) = -16777216*a^8 - 16777216*a^6
factor(psi_5(4/3)) = (-16777216) * a^6 * (a^2 + 1)

Compute psi_7 at 4/3
psi_7(4/3) = 281474976710656*a^16 - 281474976710656*a^14 - 281474976710656*a^12
factor(psi_7(4/3)) = (281474976710656) * a^12 * (a^4 - a^2 - 1)

Compute psi_9 at 4/3
psi_9(4/3) = 3626777458843887524118528*a^26 + 4835703278458516698824704*a^24 + 3626777458843887524118528*a^22 + 1208925819614629174706176*a^20
factor(psi_9(4/3)) = (3626777458843887524118528) * a^20 * (a^6 + 4/3*a^4 + a^2 + 1/3)

Compute psi_3 at -8/3
psi_3(-8/3) = -512*a^2 - 256
factor(psi_3(-8/3)) = (-512) * (a^2 + 1/2)

Compute psi_5 at -8/3
psi_5(-8/3) = -16777216*a^8 + 67108864*a^6 + 167772160*a^4 + 100663296*a^2 + 16777216
factor(psi_5(-8/3)) = (-16777216) * (a^2 + 1) * (a^6 - 5*a^4 - 5*a^2 - 1)

Compute psi_3 at 4/a^2 + 16/3
psi_3(4/a^2 + 16/3) = (1024*a^10 + 2560*a^8 + 6144*a^6 + 7680*a^4 + 4096*a^2 + 768)/a^8
factor(psi_3(4/a^2 + 16/3)) = (1024) * a^-8 * (a^2 + 1/2) * (a^8 + 2*a^6 + 5*a^4 + 5*a^2 + 3/2)

Evaluations used in the manuscript:

At xi = 4/3: psi_3(4/3)
computed = 256*a^2
expected = 256*a^2
